category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts GIFs to PNGs; source_facts.executables lists gif2png and web2png.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gif2png; current_curation.display-name is gif2png.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://gitlab.com/esr/gif2png; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GIF-to-PNG conversion; source_facts.executables lists command-line tools.
